commands.summary: Tunnel URL extraction, the fake-process start/stop lifecycle, and the Twilio webhook PATCH request shaping all pass.
Full suite green: 20 renderer interaction tests, 42 node tests (incl. new tunnel + configureNumberWebhook), and node --check of main.js/tunnel.js/onboarding.js/attention.js.
Installer ForgeLink_2.0.1_x64-setup.exe rebuilt with tunnel.js packaged and the auto-webhook wiring.

commands.command: elevated silent reinstall of the new installer, then launch
commands.summary: Reinstall approved at UAC (exit 0); installed C:\Program Files\ForgeLink\ForgeLink.exe matches the auto-tunnel build timestamp, and the app relaunched cleanly (5 processes, no crash) with the 014 main.js. End-to-end inbound delivery is exercised when the operator connects Twilio (tunnel + webhook provision on start-server).

environment.process_note: cloudflared is acquired at runtime and cached under user data (not bundled in the installer yet). The tunnel forwards only to loopback; a manual public_base_url still overrides automatic provisioning; auth tokens are never logged. AC-4's app-launch check and end-to-end inbound await the operator approving the reinstall.
